messages.content: Return JSON only. The object must have exactly the keys status, steps, and note. status must be "ok". steps must be an array of exactly two strings. note must be "ready".

concise_solution: JSON object with exact key set, fixed status/note, and two string steps

contamination_audit.notes: Original manually authored item; no benchmark text used as training content.

quality_scores.reviewer_notes: quality_gate_2026_05_08_v1: ifeval_ifbench item verified with json_schema; correctness score 0.99 reflects available deterministic/rubric evidence. Difficulty retained as hard after curator review. Benchmark alignment and novelty scores were capped to avoid self-reported inflation; original scores were {"benchmark_alignment": 0.96, "correctness": 1.0, "instruction_clarity": 1.0, "novelty": 0.96, "thai_naturalness": 1.0}.
